_attack: Coupling-map violation (IMPROVEMENTS item 3): this bundle 'finishes' the GHZ cascade with a direct cx 0,4 between the two ENDS of the line — a pair the chip cannot couple. The state it would produce is correct and the claim is honest, but qubits 0 and 4 are four hops apart on the [0-1-2-3-4] chain, so the sparse topology demands the cascade (or SWAP routing) instead. judge_verify.py must REJECT at STRUCTURE (exit 3); the reference pins the coupling map host-side, so declaring a denser map bundle-side cannot evade it.
